creator: michaelo@FreeBSD.org
text:
After committing https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=92d21e44762dcc3f5d86cb7e7cbb9733782b2218 a fellow developer made me aware that the commit message should contain an approval by portmgr@.

While reading https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/committers-guide/#ports-exp-run and searching for exp-run on the single HTML it is never explicitly stated that this is a requirement.

Request: Please update documentation that the differential review needs approval from portmgr@ before being pushed to main.
